title: FEEDING PROCEDURE
author: Askarova Khurshida
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The human body receives almost all necessary substances through food and water. The composition of food products and their properties have a direct impact on health, physical development, work ability, emotional state and, in general, the duration and quality of life. It is difficult to find another factor that can affect the human body in such a way.The human body receives almost all necessary substances through food and water. It is difficult to find another factor that can affect the human body in such a way.
